2606.23215.title: Where Is My Physics Wrong? Localized and Identifiable Discovery of Model Discrepancy
2606.23215.paper_summary: Hybrid models combine trusted physics with data-driven correction, but a physical model is rarely wrong everywhere or in the same way. The key diagnostic question is local: where does the model fail, what missing mechanism explains the failure, and is the evidence statistically real? Existing sparse-discovery and discrepancy-learning methods usually fit one global correction, which can spread a local error into clean regimes, bias trusted physical parameters, and provide no calibrated significance for selected terms. We introduce LISDD, Localized, Identifiable Sparse Discovery of Discrepancy, a framework that localizes model error to an operating regime, identifies a sparse symbolic form for the missing mechanism, and certifies the discovery with an exact finite-sample test. LISDD fits the known physics on an automatically detected clean regime, flags discrepant regions with a calibrated residual-energy statistic, selects the local missing term by exhaustive holdout over a candidate library, and confirms significance with a sample-split $F$-test. A false-discovery-rate extension handles multiple discrepant regions with different missing mechanisms. In controlled experiments, LISDD keeps physical-parameter bias at 0.002 versus 0.43 for global-discrepancy and black-box baselines, raises localization $F_1$ from 0.44 to 0.80, recovers the correct symbolic form with probability one, attains exact detection, and controls the multi-region false-discovery rate while recovering every planted mechanism. The result is a calibrated diagnostic tool for grey-box building-energy models when a fixed physical law silently breaks in one operating regime.
2606.23215.paper_summary_zh: 混合模型結合了可信的物理學與數據驅動的修正，但物理模型在任何地方或以相同方式出錯的情況是很少見的。關鍵的診斷問題是局部的：模型在哪裡失效，什麼缺失的機制解釋了這一失效，證據是否在統計上是真實的？現有的稀疏發現和差異學習方法通常擬合一個全局修正，這可能將局部錯誤擴散到乾淨的範疇，偏倚可信的物理參數，並且對所選項目提供沒有校準的顯著性。我們介紹了LISDD，即局部可識別的稀疏差異發現框架，該框架將模型錯誤定位於操作範疇，識別缺失機制的稀疏符號形式，並通過精確的有限樣本測試來證明發現的有效性。LISDD在自動檢測的乾淨範疇上擬合已知的物理學，使用校準的殘差能量統計標記不一致的區域，通過對候選庫的全面保留選擇局部缺失項，並通過樣本分割$F$-檢驗確認顯著性。一個虛假發現率擴展處理具有不同缺失機制的多個不一致區域。在受控實驗中，LISDD將物理參數的偏差保持在0.002，而全球差異和黑箱基準則為0.43，將定位的$F_1$從0.44提高到0.80，以概率1恢復正確的符號形式，實現精確檢測，並在恢復每個植入機制的同時控制多區域虛假發現率。這結果是一個校準的診斷工具，用於當固定的物理法則在一個操作範疇內默默破壞時的灰箱建築能量模型。
2606.23215.author: Yifan Wang et.al.
